mapper.insert: INSERT INTO score (student_id, paper_id, total_score, status, submit_time) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{paperId}, #{totalScore}, #{status}, #{submitTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM score WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY submit_time DESC
SELECT * FROM score WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND status = 'ongoing' ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM score WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND status IN ('finished', 'grading', 'ai_graded') ORDER BY submit_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE score SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE score SET total_score = #{totalScore} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM score WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND paper_id = #{paperId}

SELECT s.id as scoreId, s.student_id as studentId, s.paper_id as paperId, s.total_score as totalScore, s.status, s.submit_time as submitTime, stu.name as studentName, tp.name as paperName, c.id as courseId, c.name as courseName FROM score s LEFT JOIN student stu ON s.student_id = stu.id LEFT JOIN test_paper tp ON s.paper_id = tp.id LEFT JOIN course c ON tp.course_id = c.id WHERE tp.teacher_id = #{teacherId} ORDER BY s.submit_time DESC
SELECT * FROM score WHERE paper_id = #{paperId} ORDER BY submit_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM score WHERE paper_id = #{paperId}
SELECT * FROM score WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND paper_id = #{paperId}
